title: limniris fulva
intro: Limniris fulva, also known as the Marsh Marigold, is a perennial flowering plant native to Europe and Asia. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Limniris fulva include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its potential to help manage conditions such as arthritis and eczema. Herbal preparations of Limniris fulva include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used externally to soothe skin irritations and internally to promote digestive health.
